title: `podman info` must return `netavark` and `aardvark-dns` version.
body:
### Feature request description

Output of `podman info` must include `netavark` and `aardvark-dns` version just like `crun`.

### Suggest potential solution

_No response_

### Have you considered any alternatives?

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
